transcript: Speaker A: भारत की मुद्रा क्या है? [What is the currency of India?] अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App [To become the richest person in your family, download Zinglish App.]
on_screen_text: भारत की मुद्रा क्या है? [What is the currency of India?] A. Dollar, B. Rupee, C. Taka. Bank of India + 2,01,108 Credited. अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App [To become the richest person in your family, download Zinglish App]. Zinglish: English Speaking App.
summary: The ad starts with a simple currency trivia question. After showing a simulated bank credit notification, it urges viewers to download the Zinglish app to become wealthy.
